spacesSection.title: {{hubName}} Spaces
spacesSection.empty: No Spaces have been added to this hub yet.

subdomain.label: Subdomain
subdomain.readOnlyHelp: The subdomain is fixed at creation and cannot be changed.

errors.invalidFormat: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

tags.label: Tags
tags.placeholder: Type a tag and press Enter

banner.label: Banner
banner.helperText: Shown at the top of the Innovation Hub page.

crop.title: Crop banner
crop.description: Crop the image to fit the banner dimensions, then add a short description for accessibility.
crop.altPlaceholder: Describe the image for screen readers

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.subtitle: Manage which Spaces appear on the Innovation Hub home page. Drag to reorder.
spaces.empty: No Spaces have been added yet. Use Add Space to include one.

confirmRemove.title: Remove Space?
confirmRemove.body: Remove “{{name}}” from this Innovation Hub? The Space itself is not deleted; it just no longer appears on the hub home page.

addDialog.title: Add Space by URL
addDialog.description: Paste the full URL of an Alkemio Space to add it to this hub.
addDialog.invalid: We couldn't find a Space at that URL.
addDialog.duplicate: That Space is already in this hub.
addDialog.submitError: Something went wrong while adding the Space. Please try again.
